steps.title: Find undergraduates
steps.content:
Graduate students are $35\%$ of undergraduate students. Let $U$ be the number of undergraduate students.
$$4{,}851=0.35U$$
$$U=\frac{4{,}851}{0.35}=13{,}860$$

steps.title: Find postdoctoral students
steps.content:
Undergraduate students are $6{,}600\%$, or $66$ times, the number of postdoctoral students. Let $P$ be the number of postdoctoral students.
$$13{,}860=66P$$
$$P=210$$
